title: rubus norvicensis
intro: Rubus norvicensis, also known as the Norfolk raspberry, is a species of raspberry native to East Anglia in the United Kingdom. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Rubus norvicensis include its ability to aid in digestive health, reduce symptoms of menopause, and help to protect against certain types of cancer. The herbal preparation of Rubus norvicensis is often made into a tea or a tincture, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
